news.t: Chart Patterns Point to Higher Prices for Micro Caps
3 Charts Suggest Micro-Cap Stocks Are Headed Higher
Here are the ETFs to buy and the trends to watch in 2020, industry pros say

holdings.infoBox: IWC is an equity ETF with a total of 1283 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Optoelectronics stock at 2.25%, Applied Digital at 1.97%, TeraWulf at 1.73%, Cipher Digital at 1.50%, and Praxis Precision Medicines at 1.22%.

overview.description: The iShares Micro-Cap ETF (IWC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Microcap index, a market-cap-weighted index of U.S IWC was launched on Aug 12, 2005 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Chart Patterns Point to Higher Prices for Micro Caps
data.text: Top holdings of micro-cap ETFs such as IWC could soon be added to other small-cap funds, which could drive a continued move higher.

data.title: 3 Charts Suggest Micro-Cap Stocks Are Headed Higher
data.text: Bullish chat patterns on small- and micro-cap stocks across the U.S. suggest that we could be in the early stages of a long-term uptrend.

data.title: Here are the ETFs to buy and the trends to watch in 2020, industry pros say
data.text: Marijuana, gold, oil and emerging markets will all take hold as 2020 themes in the exchange-traded fund market, industry professionals say.

data.title: The ETFs industry leaders expect to rally in 2020
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani gets 2020 forecasts from Todd Rosenbluth, senior director of ETF and mutual fund research at CFRA, and Kim Arthur, founding partner and CEO of Main Management.
